ksa_text: Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-scale data and AI transformation programs, including adoption barriers, culture change levers, and executive sponsorship requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-K-002 (LS, Knowledge) excluded on seniority grounds. Text contains executive-level content not aligned with IC-to-senior-IC ANL scope. Composite 0.4218. Framework signals: nice=0.422, nist_ai_rmf=0.411, onet=0.406. ANL roles in scope are individual contributors through senior ICs; organizational or C-suite-level responsibilities fall outside this band.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Seniority concerns confirmed. Score 0.4218 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-K-002 (composite 0.4218) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Executive-level content in KSA text is not found in IC-to-senior-IC role profiles per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External ground truth confirms seniority mismatch. Exclusion upheld.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4218 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4218, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
